## 8. KEY ARCHITECTURAL COMPONENTS

### Error Handling & Logging
- **Rust:** `/runtime/crates/omega-core/src/error.rs`, `/runtime/crates/omega-memory/src/error.rs`
- **Python:** Error handling embedded in modules (agent.py, runtime.py, etc.)
- **TypeScript/Web:** Individual route handlers with try-catch

### Middleware & Routing
- **Runtime:** `/runtime/crates/omega-gateway/src/` (main gateway logic)
- **Web:** `/web/src/lib/provider-routing.ts` (provider routing logic)
- **Web:** Route handlers at `/web/src/app/api/*/route.ts`

### Authentication & Identity
- **Runtime:** `/runtime/crates/omega-identity/` (identity system)
- **Web:** `/web/src/lib/omega/policy.ts` (policy enforcement)
- **Web:** `/web/src/lib/omega/risk-gate.ts` (risk gating)

### Memory & State
- **Runtime:** `/runtime/crates/omega-memory/` (PostgreSQL + SQLite backends)
- **Python:** `/omega/phylactery.py` (memory persistence), `/omega/memory.py` (management)
- **Web:** `/web/src/lib/omega/phylactery.ts` (client-side memory)

### Tracing & Observability
- **Runtime:** `/runtime/crates/omega-trace/` (tracing layer)
- **Python:** `/omega/telemetry.py` (telemetry collection)
- **Web:** `/web/src/lib/omega/drift.ts` (drift detection)
